title: timestamp + month interval generates bogus MAL?
poc: select timestamp '1-1-1'+tmonth*interval '1' month from (select 2014*12+7) as t(tmonth);
select timestamp '1-1-1'+(tmonth-1)*interval '1' month,count(*) from (select "year"(t)*12+"month"(t) from data) as t(tmonth) group by tmonth;
key_bug_features: timestamp addition with month interval causes incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, month_offset INT);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, event_time, month_offset) VALUES (1, timestamp '2023-01-01', 5);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, event_time, month_offset) VALUES (2, timestamp '2023-06-15', NULL);
SELECT event_time + month_offset * interval '1' month FROM test_data WHERE month_offset IS NOT NULL;
SELECT timestamp '2000-01-01' + (year(event_time) * 12 + month(event_time) - 1) * interval '1' month FROM test_data;
